violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. - Boxes of food on floor in walk-in freezer.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as needed. - Large ice machine in kitchen in need of cleaning. Buildup on splash guard/ skirt.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Filters under hood in need of cleaning.
